Vampire Film Atlas
(1960-2026)

BY BRIAN BERGSTROM

This interactive GIS dashboard maps 500 cinematic landmarks across the United States. Utilizing a temporal heat map paired with coordinated coordinate point structures, it tracks the spatial evolution of horror settings over time.

Instructions:

  • Timeline: Use the media control panel at the bottom left to play, pause, or step through individual years manually.
  • Inspecting Sets: Click on consolidated maroon marker cluster bubbles to spiderfy and break open local nodes.
  • Pop-ups: Click any blood droplet vector pin to reveal individual movie specs and inline graphics.
  • Layers: Use the top-right checkbox selector control menu to toggle movie pinpoint visibility on or off.
